name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA allowing each party to share confidential information for a defined purpose. Covers use restrictions, exceptions, term, and governing law.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to fill in party details, purpose, effective date, term, and governing law before signing.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement for cloud-based SaaS products covering service access, restrictions, privacy, payment, term, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early-access design partner programs, covering product access, feedback obligations, IP ownership, confidentiality, and disclaimer of warranties.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: SLA standard terms defining uptime and response time targets, how to calculate availability, service credits for failures, and remedies including termination rights.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Agreement governing professional services engagements including SOW-based delivery, IP assignment for deliverables, payment, confidentiality, indemnification, and insurance.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-compliant DPA covering processor/subprocessor relationships, processing instructions, restricted international transfers (EEA SCCs and UK Addendum), security incidents, and audit rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for business partnerships covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment, escalation procedures, confidentiality, indemnification, and liability.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement for on-premise software licensing covering license grant, restrictions, payment, updates, warranties, limitation of liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term pilot/trial agreement for evaluating a product before a full commercial agreement, covering access, restrictions, confidentiality, and limited liability.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant BAA governing the handling of Protected Health Information (PHI) by a business associate, including safeguards, breach notification, subcontractors, and audit rights.

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum to a base agreement covering AI/ML service usage, input/output ownership, model training restrictions, non-training improvement rights, and AI-specific disclaimers.
